critical.mandate: Load knowledge fragments progressively — don't overwhelm

step.title: Assess Level
step.action: Ask user about their testing experience and goals

step.title: Select Topic
step.action: Present learning path based on level
Beginner: test pyramid, unit testing basics, AAA pattern
Intermediate: fixtures, integration testing, test doubles
Advanced: risk-based testing, architecture-level testing, contract testing

step.title: Load Knowledge
step.action: Only load fragments relevant to the selected topic

step.title: Interactive Lesson
step.action: Walk through concepts with examples and exercises
Use the user's project stack for code examples when possible

step.title: Practice Exercise
step.action: Provide a hands-on exercise the user can try
Review their solution and provide feedback
